strategies.name: Time-Series Momentum
strategies.description: Continuation-style intraday momentum; longs when the recent return and trend filter agree, shorts when both flip.
strategies.entryLogic: Momentum magnitude exceeds 0.4% aligned with EMA50 trend.
strategies.exitLogic: Momentum decays toward zero or Price closes back across EMA50.
strategies.tpLogic: Trail by 1× ATR once trade moves 1.5× ATR in favour.
strategies.slLogic: 1.5× ATR below entry for longs (mirrored for shorts).

strategies.name: 52-Bar High/Low Effect (Range Breakout)
strategies.description: Adaptation of Quantpedia's 52-Week High effect: trade continuation when price sits at the extreme of its 52-bar range.
strategies.entryLogic: Price nears range extremes with ADX confirming directional intent.
strategies.exitLogic: Price re-enters middle of 52-bar range or ADX drops below 15.
strategies.tpLogic: 1.5× ATR extension beyond the broken level.
strategies.slLogic: Just inside the prior range boundary (1× ATR cushion).

strategies.name: Residual Momentum
strategies.description: Approximates the residual-momentum factor by removing EMA200 baseline drift from recent return.
strategies.entryLogic: Abnormal momentum stretched away from EMA200 baseline, confirmed by RSI.
strategies.exitLogic: Residual collapses toward zero or RSI crosses 50 against the trade.
strategies.tpLogic: Exit when residual momentum reverts past zero.

strategies.name: Short-Term Reversal
strategies.description: Fades RSI extremes paired with a multi-ATR stretch — the intraday analogue of the 1-month reversal anomaly.
strategies.entryLogic: Extreme RSI combined with price deviating significantly from short-term mean (EMA20).
strategies.exitLogic: RSI reverts to 50 band or Price recloses on EMA20.
strategies.tpLogic: Target EMA20 (~mean) on partial; 1.5× ATR on runner.

strategies.name: Bollinger Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Fades touches of the outer Bollinger band when ADX confirms there is no dominant trend.
strategies.entryLogic: Price tags outer band during non-trending regime (ADX < 22), fading the move.
strategies.exitLogic: Price reaches Bollinger middle band or ADX rises above 25.
strategies.tpLogic: Bollinger middle band on first touch.

strategies.name: SMA Trend Filter
strategies.description: Faber-style structural trend filter using EMA50 / EMA200 — provides a directional veto for the rest of the suite.
strategies.entryLogic: Structural trend alignment (Price & Fast MA above Slow MA). Veto-only strategy.
strategies.exitLogic: EMA50 crosses back through EMA200 or Price closes through EMA200.
strategies.tpLogic: Trail by 2× ATR; ride until structural break.
strategies.slLogic: Below EMA200 for longs (mirror for shorts).

strategies.name: EMA Cross + ADX
strategies.description: Short/medium EMA crossover with ADX filter — provides the framework's primary trend-entry voice.
strategies.entryLogic: Moving average stack confirmed by directional trend strength (ADX).
strategies.exitLogic: EMA20 / EMA50 re-cross or ADX drops below 18.
strategies.tpLogic: 2× ATR or break of prior swing.

strategies.name: Donchian Breakout
strategies.description: Turtle-style 20-bar breakout entry — fast trigger for emerging trends and breakouts.
strategies.entryLogic: Price exceeds the rolling 20-bar extremes, indicating potential new trend.
strategies.exitLogic: Close back inside Donchian channel or ATR collapses.
strategies.tpLogic: 2× ATR extension or 10-bar Donchian trailing exit.

strategies.name: Volatility Regime Filter
strategies.description: Encodes the low-vol-factor and vol-risk-premium principles as a directional bias modifier.
strategies.entryLogic: Fades extremes in high-volatility regimes; anticipates grind in low-vol regimes.
strategies.exitLogic: Vol normalises or RSI returns to mid-range.
strategies.tpLogic: Half-position partial at 1× ATR; runner to mean.
strategies.slLogic: Wider stop in high-vol; tighter in low-vol.

strategies.name: News + Fear-Greed Sentiment
strategies.description: Sentiment-fusion strategy combining news, social, and Fear-Greed Index. Adds a directional tilt.
strategies.entryLogic: Sentiment shifting from fear to greed (bullish) or contrarian fade at absolute extremes.
strategies.exitLogic: Fear-greed mean-reverts or News turns neutral.

strategies.name: Support/Resistance Sweep
strategies.description: Detects intraday liquidity sweeps — wicks that pierce S/R then reclaim the level with a strong-bodied reversal close.
bullishConditions: Wick below 30-bar low, close above low, strong body
bearishConditions: Wick above 30-bar high, close below high, strong body
strategies.entryLogic: Liquidity grab below support or above resistance, immediately rejected.
strategies.exitLogic: Mean of the recent range reached or Sweep is taken back.
strategies.tpLogic: Mean of 30-bar range on partial; full range on runner.

strategies.name: Candlestick Intelligence (TA-Lib 61)
strategies.description: Voice of the 61-pattern TA-Lib candlestick engine — converts the per-bar scored detection set into a regime-aware vote.
strategies.entryLogic: High-confidence TA-Lib pattern confirmed by trend or higher timeframe.
strategies.tpLogic: Scaled by pattern category — reversals to nearest structure, continuations 1.5× ATR.
strategies.slLogic: Tight stop just past the pattern bar's invalidating extreme.

aiSystems.name: Market Decision (LLM Coordinator)
aiSystems.description: Orchestrates trade execution. Uses a local prefilter to skip flat markets. Routes elite setups to premium Groq LLMs (llama-3.3-70b-versatile) and routine adjustments to cheap models.

aiSystems.name: Market Thesis Generator
aiSystems.description: Generates natural language market narratives based on technical indicators, sentiment, and strategy consensus.

aiSystems.name: LLM News Classifier
aiSystems.description: Second-pass news validation. Re-evaluates rule-based headlines using an LLM to accurately assign CRITICAL_RISK to VERY_BULLISH tiers.

aiSystems.name: Local Fallback Engine
aiSystems.description: Deterministic fallback used when LLM providers are rate-limited or unavailable, ensuring continuous autonomous operation.

riskSystems.name: Trade Health Scorer
riskSystems.description: 10-factor weighted scoring (EMA, RSI, MACD, VWAP, Vol, ATR, Candlestick, Regime, News, PnL). Outputs 0-100 smoothed score.

riskSystems.name: Adverse Candle Penalty
riskSystems.description: Dynamically counts consecutive adverse candles, scaling penalties by volume, ATR body size, and wick rejection.

riskSystems.name: Structure Deterioration
riskSystems.description: Detects lower highs/lows, EMA loss, VWAP rejection, and momentum divergence during an active trade.

riskSystems.name: Dynamic TP/SL Levels
riskSystems.description: Adjusts Take Profit targets dynamically based on trade age and health. Adjusts Stop Loss via Break-even triggers, Profit Protection (1R, 2R, 3R), and State-dependent Trailing Stops.

riskSystems.name: Early Exit Intelligence
riskSystems.description: Monitors EMA death crosses, regime shifts, MACD collapse, adverse volume climaxes, and critical news to preemptively exit trades before Stop Loss hits.

riskSystems.name: Partial Exits (Scale-out)
riskSystems.description: Confidence-based scale-out (closes 25% if health decays to 50-59%) and sequential TP partials (closes 50% at target milestones).

newsSystems.name: CryptoCompare Feed
newsSystems.description: Fetches general market news. Sentiment derived from community voting.

newsSystems.name: Reddit Integration
newsSystems.description: Fetches r/CryptoCurrency posts. Sentiment derived from flair analysis (Bullish/Bearish tags).

newsSystems.name: Rule-Based Classifier
newsSystems.description: Fast keyword matching categorizing text into 6 tiers. Flags CRITICAL_RISK words (hack, exploit, sec emergency, bankrupt).

newsSystems.name: Fear & Greed Index
newsSystems.description: External sentiment gauge (0-100) incorporated into the NewsFearGreed strategy for contrarian signaling.

metadata.executionArchitecture: Multi-Agent Hub-and-Spoke. Deterministic strategies vote (Scorer) -> Fusion Engine -> AI Decision Filter -> Action.
